title: Ma`aleh #4610
definition:
Maaleh-acrabbim = "ascent of scorpions"

 1) a pass on the southern border of Palestine
    1a) scorpion-pass; ascent of Akrabbim
nasbUsage:
Definition: Maaleh-acrabbim = "ascent of scorpions"

 1) a pass on the southern border of Palestine
    1a) scorpion-pass; ascent of Akrabbim

    NASB:  ascent of scorpions, a place on the S. border of Isr.
